---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or API improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed API or behavior

Describe the API or behavior you would like to see.

## Why this belongs in the core

Explain why this should be part of the reusable library rather than application-specific code.

## Alternatives considered

List any workarounds or alternative designs you have considered.
